items.title: Crypto hackers steal $169M from 34 DeFi protocols in Q1: DefiLlama
items.summary: January saw the largest attack against a DeFi protocol of the quarter, the $40 million private key compromise of portfolio management platform Step Finance.

items.title: Bitcoin supply in profit heads to ‘true bear market’ levels
items.summary: CryptoQuant data shows there are 8.2 million Bitcoin currently at a loss, which is still under the amount of Bitcoin at a loss during the 2022 bear market.

items.title: Bitcoin heads into holiday weekend exposed as ETF and CME flows go offline
items.summary: Good Friday shuts CME futures and ETF activity, removing a key source of demand as large holders continue distributing and spot demand weakens.

items.title: Tokenization makes finance more efficient but introduces risks: IMF
items.summary: The IMF said tokenization could improve cross-border payments and financial inclusion in emerging economies but cited concerns over volatility and the “erosion of monetary sovereignty.”

items.title: Stablecoins flip automated clearing house volume in February
items.summary: Stablecoin monthly transaction volume hit $7.2 trillion in February, surpassing the $6.8 trillion processed by the Automated Clearing House network.

items.title: Circle to launch cirBTC wrapped Bitcoin, challenging BitGo and Coinbase
items.summary: Circle, known for issuing stablecoins including USDC and EURC, is expanding into the Bitcoin space, targeting institutional users.

items.title: Bitcoin miner Riot sold 3,778 BTC during Q1 amid broader market pressure

items.title: Big Tech firms back new x402 Foundation to advance agentic AI adoption
items.summary: The x402 protocol won't be owned by a single entity, with the Linux Foundation serving as the agentic AI protocol’s “neutral, non-profit home,” Coinbase said.

items.title: Todd Blanche, author of DOJ crypto enforcement memo, is now interim AG
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump named Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney and deputy attorney general, as the interim top prosecutor.

items.title: Naoris Launches Post-Quantum Blockchain as Bitcoin, Ethereum Devs Scramble to Face Threat
items.summary: Naoris Protocol says its blockchain network uses quantum-resistant cryptography, as the wider crypto industry prepares for future threats.

items.title: New Bitcoin price lows on the table until $76K becomes support

items.title: How a Solana feature designed for convenience let attackers drain more than $270 million from Drift
